---
title: "Veranstaltungen"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
description: "Hackathons, Workshops, Sommerschulen und Community-Treffen organisiert von chen.ist."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Veranstaltungen</h1>
    <p>Hackathons, Workshops und Community-Treffen. Bauen Sie etwas Echtes mit engagierten Menschen.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-translate" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.35rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Veranstaltungen auf Englisch & Rumänisch</h2>
      <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width:450px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem;">Unsere Veranstaltungen finden auf Englisch und Rumänisch in Rumänien statt. Das vollständige Programm finden Sie unten.</p>
      <a href="/events/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Alle Veranstaltungen (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Kommende 2026</h2>
    <p class="sub">Klicken Sie für vollständige Informationen.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="AI Ethics"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">5. März 2026</div><h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3><p>48-Stunden-Challenge. Bukarest.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Sommerschule"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1.–15. Aug 2026</div><h3>Sommerschule 2026</h3><p>Zwei Wochen Cybersicherheit und AI. Craiova.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="SpaceApps"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Okt 2026</div><h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3><p>NASAs globaler 48-Stunden-Hackathon. Craiova.</p></div></div></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Möchten Sie in Ihrer Stadt organisieren?</h2>
    <p>Werden Sie Partner und organisieren Sie chen.ist-Veranstaltungen lokal.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/de/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Kontaktieren Sie uns</a>
      <a href="/de/academy/partnerships.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Partnerschaften</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
